narration: Forces come in pairs — rockets push exhaust, exhaust pushes rockets.

narration: This is Newton's third law of motion. Every action has an equal and opposite reaction.

narration: Imagine a rocket in space. It expels gas downward and, boom, it shoots up!

narration: This principle explains not just rockets but swimming, walking, and even flying.

narration: So, every time you push off the ground, remember: you’re not just moving forward, you’re pushing against the Earth!
